hero.welcome: Welcome to Ali CNC (We design the math. You run the spin.)
hero.description: I spent years running physical CNC spindles, breathing toxic wood dust, and sweeping mountains of sawdust before realizing: virtual vectors are way better. So I left the workshop! Now, Ali CNC is a premium, 100% digital freelance files-on-demand empire led by Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar. We design CAD files, watertight 3D reliefs, and program highly optimized G-Code toolpaths. No physical carving, no shipping delays, no heavy lifting. Just pure digital perfection delivered straight to your inbox. Press that shiny, glowing Contact button below to get your files!
hero.action: CLICK TO STALK US & GET FILES!

services.cad_desc: Send us your coffee-stained napkin sketches, messy whiteboard drawings, or mental signals. We translate them into watertight, high-precision 3D CAD files (.STEP, .IGES, .DWG) in Onshape and AutoCAD. They will look gorgeous and work perfectly, even though we will never physically touch them.
services.cnc_desc: Our G-Code is so clean, your CNC router will literally weep tears of joy. We program ultra-optimized toolpaths (.NC, .TAP, .GCODE) that minimize machine wear, prevent tool breakage, and shave wood like hot butter with zero machine downtime.
services.dfm_desc: Before you spend a fortune on a real piece of walnut or mahogany that ends up as expensive firewood, we virtually audit your files. We check tolerances, check stepovers, and verify toolpaths to ensure your router won't explode.

why_choose.precision_desc: Our vector line tolerances are measured down to the micrometer. We treat digital Bezier curves with more respect than most people treat their close family members.
why_choose.efficiency_desc: Our vector nesting algorithms are so tight that your machine operator will think it is dark magic. We squeeze every single square millimeter out of your sheets to save your wallet.
why_choose.expertise_desc: Unlike desk-bound virtual designers who think CNC stands for 'Click-n-Copy', our CEO Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar actually ran real machines, breathed real sawdust, and got his hands dirty in real workshops before escaping to the virtual freelance world. He knows exactly what works on a real machine!

faq.q1_title: Do you ship physical wooden furniture or carvings?
faq.q1_desc: ABSOLUTELY NOT! We have exactly ZERO wood, ZERO physical spindles, and ZERO sawdust in our office. We are a pure digital freelance file-on-demand company. We make the files, you make the cuts. You save on shipping, and we save our lungs. It's a win-win!
faq.q2_title: Why should I click the contact button?
faq.q2_desc: Because if you don't click it, you don't get files! It is scientifically proven that clicking our contact button immediately makes you 400% more attractive and starts a chain reaction that puts watertight G-code in your inbox. Click it, tell us what you want, and let's get you some files!
faq.q3_title: What output formats do you provide?
faq.q3_desc: We export .DXF, .SVG, .STEP, .STL, .CRV3D, and raw .NC/.TAP G-Code. Basically, if a computer can read it or a CNC machine can carve it, we write it with extreme elegance.
faq.q4_title: How fast is your turnaround time?
faq.q4_desc: Standard 2D vectors take 24-48 hours. Complex 3D relief carvings take 3-5 days. If your machine is waiting and you need it yesterday, click the WhatsApp button frantically and we might work in overdrive.

experience.role1_desc: Left the physical workshop behind to run an elite, 100% online CAD/CAM freelance business. Specializes in turning complex math and drawings into watertight mechanical files and beautiful vector carvings.
experience.role2_title: Apprentice Sweeper & Spindle Operator (The Dark Ages)
experience.role2_desc: Spent years operating actual physical machines, inhaling grease, getting covered in splinters, and sweeping metric tons of physical sawdust before successfully escaping to the virtual world.
experience.role3_desc: Trained at the world's leading CNC academy to ensure every single G-code block has 100% real-world tested sanity.
experience.role4_desc: Officially certified freelance agent, generating watertight files that drive CNC routers globally.

footer.title: Stop Reading. Click the Contact Button.
footer.description: You need files. We make files. It's a match made in vector heaven. Press that glorious Stalk/Contact button right now and let's get some premium files into your machine.
footer.copyright: Ali CNC. Made in Rawalpindi with love, coffee, and 100% digital, physical-dust-free virtual sawdust in Pakistan. No routers were harmed in the hosting of this website.

contact.description: This is it. The holy grail button. Do not hesitate. Hit the WhatsApp button or fill out the form below, tell us what watertight vector or 3D relief files you need, and get ready to run your spindle!
contact.whatsapp_desc: Instant messaging for quick, frantic questions
contact.email_desc: Send a detailed manifesto of your project
contact.cadcrowd_desc: Browse our portfolio and hire us officially
contact.kakaotalk_desc: If you're in Korea and want to talk CNC
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or weird wood carving ideas...
